name: Joan Mateo Duarte Politi
positioning: I build products where AI, systems, and interface design meet.

currentBuild.name: Flare
currentBuild.description: An AI-native tool that helps teams move from idea to shipped product faster. Combining real-time collaboration with intelligent automation to eliminate the busywork between thinking and building.

story: I started building because I couldn't stop asking "what if." What if this process was faster? What if this interface actually understood the user? What if the system could adapt before the user even asked?
That curiosity pulled me across domains — from backend systems to frontend craft, from data pipelines to design tools, from solo side projects to teams shipping real products.

I don't specialize in one layer of the stack. I specialize in the full picture: understanding what needs to be built, why it matters, and making it real. Every project I take on is a bet that the right combination of technology and design can unlock something that didn't exist before.
The common thread across everything I build is conviction. I pick problems I believe in, go deep, and ship.

chess.text: I play chess to think in systems. Pattern recognition, calculated risk, knowing when to trade material for position — it all maps to building products.

books.title: The Hard Thing About Hard Things
books.author: Ben Horowitz
